title: mimulus langsdorffii var. minor
intro: Mimulus langsdorffii var. minor, also known as the lesser monkey flower, is a variety of flowering plant in the family Phrymaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome. Mimulus langsdorffii var. minor can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, making it a popular choice for those seeking natural remedies.
